name: azimuth-robotframework

metadata.name: azimuth-robotframework
metadata.summary: Robot framework library for interacting with Azimuth.

documentation:
# azimuth-robotframework

Keyword library for driving Azimuth using [Robot Framework](https://robotframework.org/).

classes.name: Azimuth.cluster_types.ClusterTypeKeywords

methods.name: Azimuth.cluster_types.ClusterTypeKeywords.list_cluster_types
documentation: Lists cluster types using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.cluster_types.ClusterTypeKeywords.fetch_cluster_type
documentation: Fetches a cluster type by name using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.cluster_types.ClusterTypeKeywords.find_cluster_type_by_name
documentation: Fetches a cluster type by name using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.cluster_types.ClusterTypeKeywords.get_defaults_for_cluster_type
documentation: Returns the default parameters for a cluster type.

methods.name: Azimuth.cluster_types.ClusterTypeKeywords.guess_parameter_values_for_cluster_type
documentation:
Attempts to guess suitable parameter values for a cluster type based on the
parameter types and constraints.
Keywords for interacting with cluster types.

classes.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_app_templates.KubernetesAppTemplateKeywords

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_app_templates.KubernetesAppTemplateKeywords.list_kubernetes_app_templates
documentation: Lists available Kubernetes app templates using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_app_templates.KubernetesAppTemplateKeywords.fetch_kubernetes_app_template
documentation: Fetches a Kubernetes app template by id using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_app_templates.KubernetesAppTemplateKeywords.get_latest_version_for_kubernetes_app_template
documentation: Returns the latest version for the Kubernetes app template.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_app_templates.KubernetesAppTemplateKeywords.get_defaults_for_kubernetes_app_template_version
documentation: Gets the default values for the given Kubernetes app template.
Keywords for interacting with Kubernetes app templates.

classes.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_apps.KubernetesAppKeywords

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_apps.KubernetesAppKeywords.list_kubernetes_apps
documentation: Lists Kubernetes apps using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_apps.KubernetesAppKeywords.fetch_kubernetes_app_by_id
documentation: Fetches a Kubernetes app by id using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_apps.KubernetesAppKeywords.find_kubernetes_app_by_name
documentation: Finds a Kubernetes app by name using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_apps.KubernetesAppKeywords.create_kubernetes_app
documentation: Creates a Kubernetes app using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_apps.KubernetesAppKeywords.update_kubernetes_app
documentation: Update the specified Kubernetes app with the given version and values.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_apps.KubernetesAppKeywords.delete_kubernetes_app
documentation: Deletes the specified Kubernetes app and waits for it to be deleted.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_apps.KubernetesAppKeywords.wait_for_kubernetes_app_status
documentation: Waits for the specified app to reach the target status before returning it.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_apps.KubernetesAppKeywords.wait_for_kubernetes_app_deployed
documentation: Waits for the app status to be deployed before returning it.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_apps.KubernetesAppKeywords.wait_for_kubernetes_app_service_url
documentation:
Returns the Zenith FQDN for the specified app service.

Because Helm does not know what constitutes a healthy Zenith reservation/client,
this may involve a wait.
Keywords for interacting with Kubernetes apps.

classes.name: Azimuth.external_ips.ExternalIpKeywords

methods.name: Azimuth.external_ips.ExternalIpKeywords.list_external_ips
documentation: Lists available external IPs using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.external_ips.ExternalIpKeywords.fetch_external_ip
documentation: Fetches an external IP by id using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.external_ips.ExternalIpKeywords.find_external_ip_by_address
documentation: Finds an external IP by IP address using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.external_ips.ExternalIpKeywords.find_free_external_ip
documentation:
Searches for an external IP that is allocated but not assigned and returns it.

If no such IP exists, an exception is raised.

methods.name: Azimuth.external_ips.ExternalIpKeywords.allocate_external_ip
documentation: Allocates a new external IP and returns it.

methods.name: Azimuth.external_ips.ExternalIpKeywords.find_free_or_allocate_external_ip
documentation:
Searches for an external IP that is allocated but not assigned and returns it.

If no such IP exists, a new one is allocated.
Keywords for interacting with external IPs.

classes.name: Azimuth.main.Azimuth

methods.name: Azimuth.main.Azimuth.create_client
documentation: Creates an Azimuth SDK client using the given authentication.

methods.name: Azimuth.main.Azimuth.create_client_from_openstack_clouds_file
documentation: Creates an Azimuth SDK client using the specified OpenStack clouds.yaml file.

methods.name: Azimuth.main.Azimuth.create_client_from_environment
documentation: Creates an Azimuth SDK client from the environment variables.

methods.name: Azimuth.main.Azimuth.switch_tenancy
documentation: Switches the current client to a different tenancy.

methods.name: Azimuth.main.Azimuth.close_client
documentation: Closes the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.main.Azimuth.generate_name
documentation: Given a prefix, generates a name with a random suffix.
Robot Framework library for testing Azimuth.

functions.name: Azimuth.zenith.tenancies_loaded
documentation: Selenium wait condition that waits for the tenancies to load on the tenancies page.

classes.name: Azimuth.zenith.url_is_stable
documentation: Selenium wait condition that waits for the URL to be stable and the page to be ready.

classes.name: Azimuth.zenith.title_contains
documentation: Selenium wait condition that waits for the given string to be in the page title.

classes.name: Azimuth.zenith.ZenithKeywords

methods.name: Azimuth.zenith.ZenithKeywords.open_browser
documentation: Opens the specified browser.

methods.name: Azimuth.zenith.ZenithKeywords.close_browser
documentation: Closes the current browser.

methods.name: Azimuth.zenith.ZenithKeywords.authenticate_browser
documentation: Authenticates the browser using the credentials from the Azimuth SDK client.

methods.name: Azimuth.zenith.ZenithKeywords.open_zenith_service
documentation: Open a Zenith service using the current browser.

methods.name: Azimuth.zenith.ZenithKeywords.wait_until_page_title_contains
documentation: Waits until the current page title contains the given string.
Keywords for interacting with Zenith services.

classes.name: Azimuth.clusters.ClusterKeywords

methods.name: Azimuth.clusters.ClusterKeywords.list_clusters
documentation: Lists clusters using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.clusters.ClusterKeywords.fetch_cluster_by_id
documentation: Fetches a cluster by id using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.clusters.ClusterKeywords.find_cluster_by_name
documentation: Finds a cluster by name using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.clusters.ClusterKeywords.create_cluster
documentation: Creates a cluster using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.clusters.ClusterKeywords.patch_cluster
documentation: Patches the specified cluster.

methods.name: Azimuth.clusters.ClusterKeywords.delete_cluster
documentation: Deletes the specified cluster and waits for it to be deleted.

methods.name: Azimuth.clusters.ClusterKeywords.wait_for_cluster_status
documentation: Waits for the specified cluster to reach the target status before returning it.

methods.name: Azimuth.clusters.ClusterKeywords.wait_for_cluster_ready
documentation: Waits for the cluster status to be ready before returning it.

methods.name: Azimuth.clusters.ClusterKeywords.get_cluster_service_url
documentation: Returns the Zenith FQDN for the specified cluster service.
Keywords for interacting with clusters.

functions.name: Azimuth.util.wait_for_resource
documentation: Waits for the specified predicate to become True for the instance with the given ID.

functions.name: Azimuth.util.wait_for_resource_property
documentation:
Waits for the specified property on the instance with the given ID to reach a target
value. It will only continue while the property is in the working values.

functions.name: Azimuth.util.delete_resource
documentation: Deletes the instance with the specified ID and waits for it to be deleted.

classes.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.NodeGroupConfig
documentation: Type for a node group config.

classes.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterConfig
documentation: Type for a Kubernetes cluster config.

classes.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.SonobuoyMode
documentation: Enumeration of Sonobuoy modes.

classes.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.list_kubernetes_clusters
documentation: Lists Kubernetes clusters using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.fetch_kubernetes_cluster_by_id
documentation: Fetches a Kubernetes cluster by id using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.find_kubernetes_cluster_by_name
documentation: Finds a Kubernetes cluster by name using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.new_kubernetes_config
documentation: Initialises a new Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.change_template_for_kubernetes_config
documentation: Changes the template for the current Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.add_node_group_to_kubernetes_config
documentation: Adds a node group to the current Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.enable_autohealing_for_kubernetes_config
documentation: Enables auto-healing for the current Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.disable_autohealing_for_kubernetes_config
documentation: Disables auto-healing for the current Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.enable_dashboard_for_kubernetes_config
documentation: Enables the Kubernetes dashboard for the current Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.disable_dashboard_for_kubernetes_config
documentation: Disables the Kubernetes dashboard for the current Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.enable_ingress_for_kubernetes_config
documentation: Enables ingress for the current Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.disable_ingress_for_kubernetes_config
documentation: Disables ingress for the current Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.enable_monitoring_for_kubernetes_config
documentation: Enables monitoring for the current Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.disable_monitoring_for_kubernetes_config
documentation: Disables monitoring for the current Kubernetes config.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.create_kubernetes_cluster
documentation: Creates a Kubernetes cluster using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.upgrade_kubernetes_cluster
documentation: Upgrades the specified Kubernetes cluster to a new template.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.delete_kubernetes_cluster
documentation: Deletes the specified Kubernetes cluster and waits for it to be deleted.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.get_kubeconfig_for_kubernetes_cluster
documentation: Returns the kubeconfig for the specified Kubernetes cluster.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.wait_for_kubernetes_cluster_status
documentation: Waits for the specified cluster to reach the target status before returning it.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.wait_for_kubernetes_cluster_ready
documentation: Waits for the cluster status to be ready before returning it.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.get_kubernetes_cluster_service_url
documentation: Returns the Zenith FQDN for the specified cluster service.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.wait_for_kubernetes_cluster_service_url
documentation:
Returns the Zenith FQDN for the specified cluster service.

Because the Zenith operator is asynchronous, we wait to see if the services appear.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_clusters.KubernetesClusterKeywords.run_sonobuoy_for_kubernetes_cluster
documentation: Runs Sonobuoy conformance tests for the specified cluster.
Keywords for interacting with Kubernetes clusters.

classes.name: Azimuth.sizes.SizeKeywords

methods.name: Azimuth.sizes.SizeKeywords.list_sizes
documentation: Lists available sizes using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.sizes.SizeKeywords.fetch_size
documentation: Fetches a size by id using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.sizes.SizeKeywords.find_size_by_name
documentation: Finds a size by name using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.sizes.SizeKeywords.find_smallest_size_with_resources
documentation: Finds the smallest size that fulfils the specified resource requirements.
Keywords for interacting with sizes.

classes.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_cluster_templates.KubernetesClusterTemplateKeywords

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_cluster_templates.KubernetesClusterTemplateKeywords.list_kubernetes_cluster_templates
documentation: Lists available Kubernetes cluster templates using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_cluster_templates.KubernetesClusterTemplateKeywords.fetch_kubernetes_cluster_template
documentation: Fetches a Kubernetes cluster template by id using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_cluster_templates.KubernetesClusterTemplateKeywords.find_kubernetes_cluster_template_by_name
documentation: Finds a Kubernetes cluster template by name using the active client.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_cluster_templates.KubernetesClusterTemplateKeywords.find_latest_kubernetes_cluster_template
documentation: Finds the Kubernetes template with the most recent version that matches the constraints.

methods.name: Azimuth.kubernetes_cluster_templates.KubernetesClusterTemplateKeywords.find_kubernetes_cluster_template_for_upgrade
documentation:
Given the ID of an existing template, find the latest template that a cluster using
that template can be upgraded to.
Keywords for interacting with Kubernetes cluster templates.
